translation.title: DevTools Vault
translation.noSnippets: No snippets found. Add some to get started!

guide.title: 💡 DevTools Vault — Quick Guide
guide.step1Desc: Click the green '+ Add Snippet' button on the top right or 'New' on the left menu to add your codes/configurations.
guide.step2Desc: Find snippets quickly using the search bar on top, or filter them by category using the left menu.
guide.step3Desc: Use 'Copy' to copy code blocks, edit or delete snippets using the icons. Data is synced to the cloud automatically!
